channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken pavement slab, 11th May
item.description:
Part of the pavement slab is completely broken which may cause a terrible accident as it is right by some steps. I have marked on the mark exactly where is. This is a new report

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 132, Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pile of miscellaneous rubbish, furniture, bags, a green waste bin(as used by LBS) which is full of rubbish., 11th May
item.description:
The pile of different items has been in this location for 2 weeks or more, & is being continuously added to, so that it is getting bigger, & spreading further across the public footpath(both in Water Mews & Linden Grove). The fact that the pile is there seems to be attracting further dumping (including from passing cars).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Water Mews, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pinned, 11th May
item.description:
Graff up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No dog signs missing from park gates, 11th May
item.description:
The no dog signs are missing from the yellow gates
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked, 11th May
item.description:
Overflowing vegetation has been an issue for months - now someone has started chaining their bike up and blocking the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sanford Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish by the bench, 11th May
item.description:
I’m not sure what’s happening at the Green but the mess and rubbish is absolutely disgusting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Falconwood Parade, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of the former job centre at the top of Cambridge Avenue closest to Kilburn High Road, 11th May
item.description:
Very bad build up of rubbish that has been present for a while and affecting the public enjoyment of the environment

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is still being used as a rubbish dump, 11th May
item.description:
This is the 2nd time of reporting this problem. The massive bag of sand is being used a rubbish dump and it all needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor decision to close bus stop, 11th May
item.description:
Hi I'm astonished that this stop has been allowed to close when buses are already unable to serve the eastern half of Church Street. This has extended an already lengthy walk. As you can see from the photo, no actual work is taking place. This is a poor decision.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Road, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping every day., 11th May
item.description:
I'm sorry I am not around every day to report this. However, i hope you are getting the message that rubbish is continuously being dumped here. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt Bin, 11th May
item.description:
Burnt bin down laneway Enfield County School

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin box left for days full in the middle of the road, 11th May
item.description:
Not sure why this has been like this for days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochford Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive light intrusion from an external estate light into my bedroom at night, affecting sleep and use of the room., 11th May
item.description:
A bright estate light shines directly into my bedroom throughout the night. Even with blinds closed, it causes significant light intrusion affecting my sleep and comfort. There are already multiple nearby street and estate lights in close proximity.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weymouth Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 11th May
item.description:
We woke up one morning to find a wilkos shopping trolley has been dumped on the pavement outside our house. It was outside my house on the pavement but i did not want it blowing into the road and I moved it into my front drive which has now became my responsibility. I looked on Bexley council website and it said to report abandoned trolleys on Trolleywise and I heard nothing. I called them this morning and they said because its wilkinsons trolley they cannot collect it. They then emailed me and said I need to contact my council. Im at a loss at what to do its in my front garden. I cant just put it back on the road because its dangerous as cars drive down a lot. Please advise. You have marked my previous report as fixed and it’s still there. Please advise.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Luddesdon Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Litter Picking Needed on Elcot Avenue Area, 11th May
item.description:
Fenham Road, Friary Road and Elcot Avenue all filled with litter and rarely get cleaned and never properly. Please do a a thorough job asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near corner of Harben Road, 11th May
item.description:
Drain completely blocked on top — but may just need cleaning — may not be an internal problem.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Fairfax Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Path, 11th May
item.description:
An unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted TV Dumped on Path, 11th May
item.description:
A large unwanted TV has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Bed and Other Rubbish Dumped on Path, 11th May
item.description:
A broken bed and other rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken post, 11th May
item.description:
Yet another broken post – I am also not entirely convinced that my previous report was repaired which is close to this one. The delivery van drivers are still knocking these.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
